hooks.command: sh -c 'FEAT=$(head -1 .spec-first/current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FEAT" ] && npx spec-first gate check "$FEAT" || echo "spec-first: 跳过 gate 检查（无当前 feature）"'
sh -c 'FEAT=$(head -1 .spec-first/current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FEAT" ] && npx spec-first matrix check "$FEAT" || echo "spec-first: 跳过 matrix 检查（无当前 feature）"'
sh -c 'FEAT=$(head -1 .spec-first/current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FEAT" ] && npx spec-first ai stats "$FEAT" >/dev/null || true'
